title: navarretia orcuttii
intro: Navarretia orcuttii, also known as Orcutt's clarkia or Orcutt's mountain spring beauty, is a rare, annual plant species belonging to the phlox family (Polemoniaceae). The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, primarily in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. Navarretia orcuttii is also believed to have various health benefits, including its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically or internally for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
